name: Space-Age-Hardcore-Mode
title: ​Space Age: Hardcore Mode
author: thesixthroc
description:
Space Age: Hardcore Mode is a collection of tweaks & mods that tighten the gameplay of Space Age by removing shortcuts and adding interesting challenge. It is not a gratuitous difficulty mod, but is rather a replacement for vanilla Space Age — the game Wube would have made if they were less concerned with catering to casual players.

Special technologies are required to drop cargo on Tier 2 planets. Each such planet has incentive to build a small on-planet science chain.
